nasb.text: The sound of a carefree multitude was with her; and drunkards were brought from the wilderness with men of the common sort. And they put bracelets on the hands of the women and beautiful crowns on their heads.

esv.text: The sound of a carefree multitude was with her; and with men of the common sort, drunkards were brought from the wilderness; and they put bracelets on the hands of the women, and beautiful crowns on their heads.

cnv.text: 在那裡有安逸無憂的群眾發出喧嘩的聲音，有粗俗的人和酒徒從曠野而來，他們把手環戴在兩個婦人的手上，把美麗的冠冕戴在她們頭上。

ccb.text: 她们屋里传出众人的安乐声，从旷野来的酒徒和粗汉把镯子戴在这对姊妹的手腕上，把华冠戴在她们的头上。
